login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace

bannedBanner.title: Your account has been suspended.
bannedBanner.permanent: This suspension is permanent. Contact Ensdim for more information.

errors.banned: Your account has been suspended by Ensdim. Contact us for more information.
errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Check your email

errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

emailConfirmed.title: Email confirmed!
emailConfirmed.body: Your account has been activated successfully. You can now sign in.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}

success.title: Email Verified!
success.body: Your account is now active. Redirecting...

errors.invalidOtp: Invalid or incorrect code. Please try again.
errors.expired: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
